The company, formerly known as Zhipu, has started partially operating the site, Bloomberg reported, citing a person […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> AMD’s Helios puts 72 GPUs and 31 terabytes of HBM4 in one rack. It is AMD’s answer to Nvidia’s NVL72. https://thenextweb.com/news/amd-helios-mi455x-72-gpu-rack-nvidia-rival Mon, 20 Jul 2026 15:25:43 +0000 TheNextWeb=a5a223fde7c869efae83d5489b416527 AMD’s Helios is a single rack containing 72 Instinct MI455X GPUs, 31 terabytes of HBM4 memory, and 2.9 exaflops of FP4 inference compute. It is AMD’s first rack-scale AI system and its direct answer to Nvidia’s Vera Rubin NVL72. The system uses 18 compute trays, each holding four MI455X accelerators on the new CDNA 5 […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Google’s AI cited Facebook 19.5 million times, new research finds https://thenextweb.com/news/google-ai-overviews-social-platforms-brightedge Mon, 20 Jul 2026 14:57:47 +0000 TheNextWeb=f25a556bbd61002aaf6ba3d8a8159877 When Google’s AI answers a question, it is increasingly not reading a website. It is reading a Facebook post. New data suggests social platforms have become a core source for Google’s AI answers. Often the user never visits the platform at all. The findings come from BrightEdge, an enterprise SEO firm. Its tool tracks roughly […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Google is building a chip with Gemini baked into the silicon https://thenextweb.com/news/google-frozen-chip-gemini-silicon Mon, 20 Jul 2026 14:46:54 +0000 TheNextWeb=73dede5679a910f16672a0d400df0ff7 Most AI chips are general-purpose. You load a model onto them, and they run it. Google is reportedly trying something stranger: a chip that is the model, with Gemini’s blueprint etched into the hardware itself. The project, informally called “Frozen v2,” was reported by The Information and picked up by Reuters and Bloomberg Law. Alphabet […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> OneDrive will block screenshots of sensitive documents, but only in Microsoft’s own browser. https://thenextweb.com/news/microsoft-edge-screenshot-blocking-sensitive-pdfs Mon, 20 Jul 2026 14:43:59 +0000 TheNextWeb=05d0c252da9c5202672fe372a1894ade Starting next month, OneDrive and SharePoint will block screen captures when enterprise users open certain sensitivity-labelled PDFs in Microsoft Edge. The restriction applies to documents carrying a Purview Information Protection label without the Copy (EXTRACT) permission. When those conditions are met, screenshot blocking activates by default. Personal OneDrive accounts and unlabelled files are not affected. […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Netflix used AI in 300 shows. The flaw is the same one. https://thenextweb.com/news/ai-agent-security-four-attacks-one-flaw Mon, 20 Jul 2026 14:09:53 +0000 TheNextWeb=d6985e7b310bbe82c86e37e2b07eff0b We spent two years asking whether AI would lie to us. The more useful question this summer is what happens once we hand it the keys. Give a model your Gmail, your calendar, a memory and the power to act, and its mistakes stop being embarrassing. They start being exploitable. Over roughly ten days in […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> EVs outsold petrol and diesel in Germany for the first time. The birthplace of the car just changed its fuel. https://thenextweb.com/news/evs-outsold-gas-diesel-germany-first-time Mon, 20 Jul 2026 13:58:40 +0000 TheNextWeb=f771671a37c7fa53221c7e0bcb686a40 Electric cars outsold every other fuel type in Germany for the first time in June. The country’s Federal Motor Transport Authority recorded 84,057 new EV registrations, a 78.2% year-on-year increase, putting battery-electric vehicles at 28.4% market share.
